title: eleocharis quinqueflora var. suksdorfiana
intro: Eleocharis quinqueflora var. suksdorfiana, also known as Suksdorf's spike-rush or Suksdorf's needle-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eleocharis quinqueflora var. suksdorfiana include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
